creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
Slight correction to previous patch for swt-devel

Fix: Previous patch forgot to change the SWT_VERSION variable,
	resulting in incorrect plist.
	distinfo still needs to be filled in with x86 and ppc versions.

	This upgrade also fixes at least one dependent port that I know of (Vuze), which
        wouldn't work properly with swt-devel 3.6.2.
How-To-Repeat: 	Ignore previous send-pr.  Use this one.
